title: WIP: Cirrus: Enable parallel testing on Fedora 28
body:
Run verify, unit, int. tests on a Fedora VM, but tolerate any/all failures.  This gives it runtime and visibility but prevents it from blocking merges (for now).

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

Heh, well shit, tests passed on fedora: https://cirrus-ci.com/task/4973768485109760  That's a happy surprise :smile:
Hrmmm...tests on Cirrus + Fedora is finding problems.  Most frequently fail in python-podman integration tests, but sometimes pass :confounded:
note to me:  Something's wrong with the new fedora image, it's not executing the cirrus agent.
rebuilt fedora image (networking was broken).  Should pass tests now.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #1660) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
WIP: This will most likely get combined with #1674

this is being combined with with work and re-tooled into smaller, easier to review commits/PRs.
